shortDescription: 3,000-14,000+ games (count varies; likely library growth since 2023 launch). Dedicated Irish domain (lukkicasino.ie) and Ireland-specific bonus page
payoutTimes: E-wallets instant; bank transfers up to several days; KYC required before first withdrawal
license: Curaçao Gaming Control Board (Just Entertainment B.V., licence OGL/2024/164/0246)

bonuses.name: Welcome Bonus
bonuses.description: 100% up to €500 + 100 FS, then 100% up to €500 + 50 FS, then 50% up to €1,000 + 50 FS, then 25% up to €2,000 + 100 FS — up to €4,000 + 300 FS total
